channel.title: GPv1 on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in GPv1 on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: Retirement: GPv1 and Legacy Blob storage account creation
item.description:
Azure is retiring all General purpose v1 (GPv1) storage accounts, including legacy blob storage accounts. The notice says this is part of ongoing Azure Storage portfolio changes aimed at improving performance, scalability, and cost efficiency.

  • Source: Azure Updates
